parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — hold (stable). A compound templateExercise (repMin 6 / repMax 8 / sets 3 / startWeight 60) whose recent sessions sit BELOW the rep ceiling (3 sets x 7 reps @ 60kg, rir 2) with no volume drop / no technique issue drives the hold path: shouldAdd false, shouldBackoff false, nextWeight = lastWeight (60), reps = repMax (8), default note '先把 60kg 稳定推进到目标次数上限'. shouldUseTopBackoff true; buildSetPrescription emits the top+backoff prescription. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso anchored in the PAST => live fineTune window empty (golden-neutral). Sessions NEWEST-FIRST. reps 7 < repMax 8 => not hitTop => hold.
